title: Per-page notes registry for regen levers
oneline: Registry mined (28 entries), auto-loaded by generators, CLI wins; spider-tall passed first take
summary: Mined the real per-page levers out of commit bodies, pipeline.md, and sibling idea-runs into fill-src/<cat>/notes.json for all 8 categories (28 entries: flags, print-only retry recipes, review expectations, provenance). A ~100-line lib/page-notes.mjs merges defaults < registry < CLI per page, patched into gen-coloring-fills-dark.mjs and gen-coloring-chalk.mjs with a --dry-run provenance mode. One live Gemini call proved it end-to-end: nature/spider-tall regenerated with its registry note auto-injected and passed every gate on the first take (drift 0.0000, lineW 246) — a page that originally burned ~26 attempts.
tried: Mining git log full commit bodies + pipeline.md + idea-runs #2/#5/#6 for every recorded per-page lever
Per-category fill-src/<cat>/notes.json schema with flags / retry / review / why and a '*' category wildcard
lib/page-notes.mjs read path (defaults < notes.json < CLI) patched into the night-fill and chalk generators
--dry-run provenance mode tagging each resolved setting [cli]/[notes.json]/[default]
One live spider-tall night generation with the registry note auto-injected
worked: All three named pages resolve their levers automatically (spider-tall notes+attempts, train-wide procedural review, house-wide no-eyes note); shapes '*' wildcard works
CLI precedence verified: explicit --notes/--max-attempts override registry values
Live proof: spider-tall passed all four gates on the FIRST take with zero levers typed (historically ~26 attempts pre-note)
Patch re-applies clean on baseline 8e471b8 (git apply --check)
failed: Original verbatim --notes strings are unrecoverable from history — 4 of ~14 flag entries are reconstructions (marked in why), which is itself the strongest argument for the registry
limitations: gen-coloring-fills.mjs (light) has no notes/gate flags yet, so its 'light' registry section is reserved, not consumed
normalize-outline-strokes.mjs not patched (identical ~15-line treatment; its entries are in the registry as data)
retry recipes (e.g. unicorn-wide dilate-lines) are printed, never auto-applied — escalation stays manual
Registry stays alive only if updating notes.json becomes part of the shipping runbook in pipeline.md

code.title: Full re-appliable patch: lib + 2 generators + 8 registry files
Mined registry: nature (spider-tall, ladybug, bee, caterpillar)
Mined registry: vehicles (train-wide procedural review, police blind spot)
Mined registry: objects (house-wide no-eyes note, apple-tall strict gate)
Mined registries: farm / dinosaur / creatures / shapes / space
